name: x402-bazaar-mcp
description: Base token-safety for agents: the only B20 freeze/seize/rug suite + pre-trade gates, over x402.
long_description: MCP server exposing x402 Bazaar's paid Base APIs as agent tools. Its edge is Base token safety: the only B20 (Base-native token standard) suite anywhere — freeze/seize/rebase/policy checks no ERC-20 tool can see — plus pre-trade GO/HOLD/STOP gates, honeypot/sellability/rug scores, wallet & approval audits, sign-guard, prices, and Claude-written AI reports. Every tool works instantly on the free tier (one call per day per service, then a preview). Add a prepaid credit token (buy once with USDC, no wallet in the agent) or a Base wallet private key to unlock unlimited paid calls via x402 micro-payments in USDC — no API keys anywhere.

credit_token.title: Prepaid credit token (recommended)
credit_token.description: A credit token (ck_…) from the buy-credits service (one x402 settlement mints it — see https://402.com.tr/agents). Each call debits your prepaid balance — no wallet or signing per call. Leave empty to stay on the free tier.

agent_private_key.title: Agent wallet private key (alternative)
agent_private_key.description: Private key of a Base wallet holding USDC, used locally to sign x402 payments (gasless for the payer). Only used if no credit token is set. Use a dedicated low-balance wallet.

catalog_url.title: Catalog URL
catalog_url.description: Override the x402 Bazaar catalog endpoint (optional).
